title: wahlbergella uralensis
intro: Wahlbergella uralensis, also known as Ural wormwood, is a flowering plant species in the family Apiaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and aiding in the treatment of various digestive issues. Wahlbergella uralensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
